Press-freedom / legal-risk advisor

Advisory only. Run this when you want risk notes, verification paths, and wording options. The publisher decides what to investigate, edit, hold, or publish.

Run Advisor
Distinguish verified facts, allegations, opinion, and unanswered questions.
Use extra care with private individuals, minors, medical details, addresses, and active legal matters.
Keep notes on source reliability and why publishing serves the community.

inputs.value: City Council Meeting Rescheduled for July 1st

The City Council meeting originally scheduled for June 30th has been rescheduled to July 1st at 7 PM.

Residents are encouraged to attend if they wish to participate in discussions and provide input on local matters. For the most accurate information, please verify the new date and time with official sources.

Next steps:
- Confirm the new meeting details (date, time, location) from the city's official website or a press release.
